Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 34 

BILLED_AMT 

LABEL: Total Claim Billed Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The total amount billed for this claim, at the header claim level, as submitted by the provider. 

SHORT NAME: BILLED_AMT 

LONG NAME: BILLED_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g.,
